svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"><diagram id="arch" name="Architecture"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="600" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="ent" value="Enterprise (behind the gateways)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#999999;dashed=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="735" y="35" width="345" height="470" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="c1" value="Local app
in-memory MAF agent (no Foundry)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="55" width="230" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="c2" value="Foundry agent
native AI Gateway (APIM + MI)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="235" width="230" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="c3" value="Foundry agent
BYO LiteLLM gateway" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="415" width="230" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="apim" value="APIM AI Gateway
load balance · MCP · A2A" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="430" y="115" width="180" height="100" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="litellm" value="LiteLLM gateway
OpenAI-compatible proxy" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="430" y="405" width="180" height="85" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="f1" value="Enterprise Foundry — East US 2
gpt-4o-mini" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="760" y="70" width="300" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="f2" value="Enterprise Foundry — Sweden Central
gpt-4o-mini" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="760" y="150" width="300" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="mcp" value="Remote MCP server
Microsoft Learn" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="760" y="270" width="300" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="a2a" value="Remote A2A agents
specialist" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="760" y="350" width="300" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="subscription key" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="c1" target="apim"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="managed identity" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="c2" target="apim"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="master key" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="c3" target="litellm"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" value="load balanced" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apim" target="f1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e5" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apim" target="f2"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e6" value="govern" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apim" target="mcp"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e7" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apim" target="a2a"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e8" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="litellm" target="f1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e9" style="endArrow=block;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="litellm" target="f2"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e10" value="re-exposed" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="litellm" target="mcp"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e11" style="endArrow=block;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="litellm" target="a2a"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
